text:
Hotel Bayloke (ベイローク, Beirōku) is presumably a high-class hotel located in Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 12, Chapter 112 

Overview

The Hotel Bayloke is a high-class hotel within Yorknew City. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The Hotel Bayloke is mentioned by Leorio in an attempt to surreptitiously convey a message to the restrained Gon and Killua about Kurapika's trap. 

Translations around the World

References
